scripts.build: pnpm --filter @xcoding/protocol build && pnpm --filter @xcoding/client build && pnpm --filter @xcoding/cli build && pnpm --filter @xcoding/desktop build
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @xcoding/protocol build && pnpm --filter @xcoding/client build && pnpm --filter @xcoding/cli check && pnpm --filter @xcoding/desktop check
scripts.test:e2e: cargo build -p xcoding-server && node tests/e2e/read-only-agent.mjs && node tests/e2e/guarded-write-agent.mjs && node tests/e2e/auto-edit-mode.mjs && node tests/e2e/command-allowlist.mjs && node tests/e2e/running-cancel-agent.mjs && node tests/e2e/session-replay-agent.mjs && node tests/e2e/write-loop-agent.mjs && node tests/e2e/git-tools-agent.mjs && node tests/e2e/provider-auth-error.mjs && node tests/e2e/provider-status.mjs && node tests/e2e/doctor.mjs && node tests/e2e/desktop-review.mjs && node tests/e2e/desktop-layout.mjs && node tests/e2e/desktop-config.mjs && node tests/e2e/task-summary.mjs && node tests/e2e/session-continue.mjs && node tests/e2e/surface-parity.mjs
